title: XP Config
description: Adds configurable multipliers to various xp sources.
body:
# XP Config 
---
#### Adds configurable multipliers to various xp sources.

## Configuration 
---
You can configure multipliers in the config file: `xpconfig-server.toml`. It appears after the first visit to the world. (If you use a number less than 1 in the configuration, for example 0.6, you can reduce the experience gained).
Formula: vanillaExperienceGained * youreNumber in config.

Right now, you can change the following experience multipliers for:

*   \*\*Ore Mining
*   \*\*Mobs
*   \*\*Smelting, Blasting, Cooking
*   \*\*Fishing
*   \*\*Villager and Wandering Trading
*   \*\*Xp bottle
*   \*\*Fishing
*   \*\*Advancements
*   \*\*Grind Stone
*   \*\*Mob Breeding
